caption: The video clip consists of a black screen featuring a single line of white text. The text, which remains static throughout the sequence, reads "theCUBE® is a registered trademark of ©SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. All rights reserved." The phrase is centered horizontally in the middle of the screen, appearing in a clean, sans-serif font. There are no people, objects, settings, or other visual elements present in any of the frames. The scene does not change over time, remaining a consistent display of the copyright and trademark notice against a solid black background.
